case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CRISPIN GALLARDOGARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-18-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
